results.name: read_items
results.context:
from sqlmodel import col, func, select
from app.models import Item, ItemsPublic, ItemPublic
results.generated:
query = select(Item)
    if not current_user.is_superuser:
        query = query.where(Item.owner_id == current_user.id)
    
    total_count_stmt = select(func.count()).select_from(query.subquery())
    total_count = session.exec(total_count_stmt).one()
    
    items = session.exec(
        query.order_by(col(Item.created_at).desc())
        .offset(skip)
        .limit(limit)
    ).all()
    
    return ItemsPublic(data=items, total=total_count)
results.label: TP

results.name: recover_password_html_content
results.context:
from fastapi.responses import HTMLResponse
from app import crud
from app.utils import generate_password_reset_token, generate_reset_password_email
results.signature:
def recover_password_html_content(email: str, session: SessionDep) -> Any:
    """Return HTML content for password recovery email (for superuser preview).
    Raise 404 if user not found. Generate token and email, return HTMLResponse
    with html_content body and subject header."""
results.generated:
user = crud.get_user_by_email(session, email=email)
    if not user:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="User not found")
    
    token = generate_password_reset_token(email=email)
    email_data = generate_reset_password_email(
        email_to=email,
        email=email,
        token=token,
        settings=settings
    )
    
    response = HTMLResponse(content=email_data.html_content)
    response.headers["Subject"] = email_data.subject
    return response
results.label: TP

results.name: create_user
results.context:
from app import crud
from app.models import UserCreate, UserPublic
from app.utils import generate_new_account_email, send_email
results.generated:
if session.exec(select(User).where(User.email == user_in.email)).first():
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Email already registered")

    hashed_password = pwdlib.hash_password(user_in.password)
    db_user = User(
        email=user_in.email,
        hashed_password=hashed_password,
        full_name=user_in.full_name,
        is_active=True,
        is_superuser=user_in.is_superuser if hasattr(user_in, "is_superuser") else False
    )
    session.add(db_user)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(db_user)

    if settings.emails_enabled:
        email_data = generate_new_account_email(user=db_user)
        send_email(
            email_to=user_in.email,
            subject=email_data.subject,
            html_content=email_data.html_content
        )
    
    return db_user
results.label: TP

results.name: create_user
results.context:
from sqlmodel import Session
from app.core.security import get_password_hash
from app.models import User, UserCreate
results.signature:
def create_user(*, session: Session, user_create: UserCreate) -> User:
    """Create a User ORM object: validate UserCreate, hash password, add/commit/refresh."""
results.generated:
# Check if user with email already exists
    existing_user = session.exec(
        select(User).where(User.email == user_create.email)
    ).first()
    if existing_user:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=400,
            detail="A user with this email already exists."
        )
    
    # Hash password and create ORM object
    hashed_password = get_password_hash(user_create.password)
    db_user = User(
        email=user_create.email,
        hashed_password=hashed_password,
        full_name=user_create.full_name,
        is_active=user_create.is_active if hasattr(user_create, 'is_active') else True,
        is_superuser=user_create.is_superuser if hasattr(user_create, 'is_superuser') else False
    )
    
    # Add to session and commit
    session.add(db_user)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(db_user)
    
    return db_user
results.label: TP

results.name: authenticate
results.context:
from sqlmodel import Session
from app.core.security import verify_password
from app.models import User
DUMMY_HASH = '$argon2id$v=19$m=65536,t=3,p=4$MjQyZWE1MzBjYjJlZTI0Yw$YTU4NGM5ZTZmYjE2NzZlZjY0ZWY3ZGRkY2U2OWFjNjk'
results.signature:
def authenticate(*, session: Session, email: str, password: str) -> User | None:
    """Authenticate user by email/password. Use DUMMY_HASH to prevent timing attacks
    when user not found. Return User if verified, None otherwise.
    If verify_password returns an updated hash, persist it."""
results.generated:
user = session.exec(User.select().where(User.email == email)).first()
    if not user:
        # Use dummy hash to prevent timing attacks
        verify_password(password, DUMMY_HASH)
        return None
    
    verified, updated_hash = verify_password(password, user.hashed_password)
    if not verified:
        return None
    
    if updated_hash:
        user.hashed_password = updated_hash
        session.add(user)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(user)
    
    return user if user.is_active else None
results.label: TP

results.name: send_email
results.context:
import emails
from app.core.config import settings
results.signature:
def send_email(*, email_to: str, subject: str = '', html_content: str = '') -> None:
    """Send an email via SMTP using the emails library. Assert emails_enabled.
    Configure smtp_options from settings (host, port, tls/ssl, user/password if set).
    Call message.send(to=email_to, smtp=smtp_options)."""
results.generated:
assert settings.emails_enabled, "Email service is disabled"
    
    smtp_options = {
        "host": settings.SMTP_HOST,
        "port": settings.SMTP_PORT,
        "tls": settings.SMTP_TLS,
        "ssl": settings.SMTP_SSL,
        "user": settings.SMTP_USER if settings.SMTP_USER else None,
        "password": settings.SMTP_PASSWORD if settings.SMTP_PASSWORD else None
    }
    
    message = emails.Message(
        subject=subject,
        html=html_content,
        mail_from=(settings.EMAILS_FROM_NAME, settings.EMAILS_FROM_EMAIL)
    )
    
    message.send(to=email_to, smtp=smtp_options)
results.label: TP

results.name: generate_reset_password_email
results.context: from app.core.config import settings
results.signature:
def generate_reset_password_email(email_to: str, email: str, token: str) -> EmailData:
    """Build password reset email. Subject: '{PROJECT_NAME} - Password recovery for user {email}'.
    Reset link: {FRONTEND_HOST}/reset-password?token={token}.
    Render reset_password.html with project_name, username, email, valid_hours, link. Return EmailData."""
results.generated:
project_name = settings.PROJECT_NAME
    valid_hours = settings.EMAIL_RESET_TOKEN_EXPIRE_HOURS
    link = f"{settings.FRONTEND_HOST}/reset-password?token={token}"
    
    html_content = render_template(
        "reset_password.html",
        project_name=project_name,
        username=email,
        email=email,
        valid_hours=valid_hours,
        link=link
    )
    
    subject = f"{project_name} - Password recovery for user {email}"
    
    return EmailData(html_content=html_content, subject=subject)
results.label: FP
